description_long: This is an adult female pedestrian with a fit physique, dressed in athletic wear suitable for urban or park environments. She is wearing a sleeveless sports crop top and matching athletic shorts, both with a fitted cut. Her footwear consists of low-profile sneakers, and her arms are extended horizontally to the sides. The figure has a straight, upright posture and a medium-length, straight hairstyle with bangs that frame the face. The overall appearance suggests she is ready for physical activity or casual movement in an urban setting.
description: Athletic adult female in sports crop top, shorts, and sneakers, standing upright with arms extended. Medium-length straight hairstyle with bangs.
description_view_0: Front view shows the athletic crop top, shorts, sneakers, and straight hairstyle with bangs clearly visible.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the profile of the face, the fitted nature of the clothing, and the arm extended outward.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the back of the crop top, shorts, and the straight cut of the hairstyle.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the profile, arm extension, and side of the athletic outfit.
attribute_clothing_type: athletic wear consisting of a sleeveless sports crop top and fitted athletic shorts
attribute_posture: standing upright with arms extended horizontally
